sections.heading: S
sections.section_value: The patient reports pain in the right knee, particularly with weight-bearing. He also reports pain in the left hand. The patient states this was the first time they injured their knee. The patient took Aleve twice a day.

sections.heading: O
sections.section_value: The patient's blood pressure is approximately 120/80 mmHg. The patient reports pain in the right knee and left hand. The patient's pulse is 78 bpm and regular. Neurological exam is unremarkable.

sections.heading: A
sections.section_value: The patient has a medial collateral ligament strain and knee injury. The patient's high blood pressure is being managed with medication.

sections.heading: P
sections.section_value: The doctor orders an x-ray of the patient's right knee. The doctor orders a lipid panel. The doctor orders a tetanus shot. The doctor prescribes meloxicam. The doctor recommends physical therapy. The patient is taking lisinopril 20 milligrams a day.
